title: Az's Mining Dimension
body:
Az's Mining Dimension offers a copy of the normally generated overworld, 
which serves as a mining dimension! 


Long story short:

14 cobblestone just like you'd place it for a Nether Portal
1 Charged Amethyst to ignite the Portal! 

Charged Amethyst is crafted by surrounding an Amethyst Shard with 4 copper ingots. 

Once the Frame has been placed, light it with the Charged Amethyst, just as you would with a Nether Portal! 

Tested in modded Environment - it sure does work!
Time is fixed at 6000! 

1.0.1 

Added a Deepslate Mining Dimension

portal frame made of cobbled deepslate - ignited by Deep Charged Amethyst!

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
